entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Research and development efforts to manage natural resources for sustainability and livelihood security

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY OF PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: The ability of production systems to maintain productivity and ecological balance over time

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The security of the poor's means of living in developing countries

entities.name: IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of measuring the effectiveness of interventions on environmental and livelihood objectives

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL OUTCOME
entities.description: Tangible and intangible changes in natural resources and the environment resulting from interventions

entities.name: ECONOMIC OUTCOME
entities.description: The financial or economic results of natural resource management practices

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector in which natural resource management practices are applied

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL IMPACTS
entities.description: Physical and biological changes resulting from natural resource management interventions

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Benefits derived from natural resource management investments

entities.name: VALUATION OF ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Methods for assigning monetary or non-monetary value to ecosystem services

entities.name: INTEGRATED ASSESSMENT
entities.description: Economic methodologies and approaches for assessing both economic and environmental impacts

entities.name: ICRISAT-PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location where the international workshop on NRM impact assessment was held
